tables_index.description: Begin and end table. This table contains a counter to establish how many times to access a tree record in the TREE_GRM_ESTN table. This is used when calculating net growth accounting estimates.

Boundary table. This table provides a description of the demarcation line between two conditions that occur on a single subplot.
- BOUNDARY.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the boundary
records to the unique plot record.

tables_index.table_name: Condition Down Woody Material Calculation Table
tables_index.description:
Condition down woody material calculation table. This table contains calculated values and condition-level estimates for down woody attributes by plot number (PLOT), condition class number (CONDID), and evaluation identifier (EVALID).
- COND_DWM_CALC.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
down woody material calculation records to the unique plot record.
- COND_DWM_CALC.CND_CN = COND.CN links the
down woody material calculation records to the unique condition record.
- COND_DWM_CALC.STRATUM_CN =
POP_STRATUM.CN links the down woody material calculation records to the unique population stratum record.

Condition table. This table provides information on the discrete combination of landscape attributes that define the condition (a condition will have the same land class, reserved status, owner group, forest type, stand-size class, regeneration status, and stand density).
- COND.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the condition class
record(s) to the plot table.
- COND.PLT_CN = SITETREE.PLT_CN and
COND.CONDID = SITETREE.CONDID links the condition class record to the site tree data.
- COND.PLT_CN = TREE.PLT_CN and COND.CONDID
= TREE.CONDID links the condition class record to the tree data.

County table. This table contains survey unit codes and is also a reference table for the county codes and names.
- COUNTY.CN = PLOT.CTY_CN links the unique county
record to the plot record.

tables_index.table_name: Down Woody Material Coarse Woody Debris Table
tables_index.description:
Down woody material coarse woody debris table. This table provides information for each piece of coarse woody debris measured along the transects.
- DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN =
PLOT.CN links the down woody material coarse woody debris records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN =
COND.PLT_CN and DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the coarse woody debris records to the unique condition record.

tables_index.table_name: Down Woody Material Duff, Litter, Fuel Table
tables_index.description:
Down woody material duff, litter, fuel table. This table provides information on the duff, litter, fuelbed depths measured at a point on the transects.
- DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the duff, litter, fuelbed records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN
and DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the duff, litter, fuel records to the unique condition record.

tables_index.table_name: Down Woody Material Fine Woody Debris Table
tables_index.description:
Down woody material fine woody debris table. This table provides information on the fine woody debris measured along a segment of the transects.
- DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN
links the fine woody debris records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN =
COND.PLT_CN and DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the fine woody debris records to the unique condition record.

tables_index.table_name: Down Woody Material Microplot Fuel Table
tables_index.description:
Down woody material microplot fuel table. This table provides information on the fuel loads (shrubs and herbs) measured on the microplot.
- DWM_MICROPLOT_FUEL.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the microplot fuel records to the unique plot record.

tables_index.table_name: Down Woody Material Residual Pile Table
tables_index.description:
Down woody material residual pile table. This table provides information on the wood piles measured on the subplot.
- DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
wood piles records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CNand
DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the wood piles records to the unique condition record.

tables_index.table_name: Down Woody Material Transect Segment Table
tables_index.description:
Down woody material transect segment table. This table describes the down woody material transect segment lengths by condition class.
- DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN
links the down woody material transect length records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.PLT_CN =
COND.PLT_CN and DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the down woody material transect segment records to the unique condition record.

Down woody material visit table. This table provides general information on down woody material indicator visit, such as the date of the DWM survey.
- DWM_VISIT.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the down
woody material indicator visit record to the unique plot record.

Ground cover table. This table provides ground cover measurement data for National Forest System (NFS) ownership protocols.
- GRND_CVR.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the ground
cover record to the unique plot record.

Ground layer functional groups table. This table is used to record the data for thirteen ground layer functional groups that may be found on the sampled microquadrats. These data are used to determine nonvascular forest floor composition and carbon content on forest and nonforest conditions.
Ground layer microquadrat table. This table records ground layer data for the microquadrats.

Invasive subplot species table. This table provides percent cover data of invasive species identified on the subplot.
- INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the invasive subplot species record(s) to the unique plot record.
- INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN =
SUBP_COND.PLT_CN and INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.CONDID = SUBP_COND.CONDID and INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.SUBP = SUBP_COND.SUBP links the invasive subplot species record(s) to the unique subplot condition record.
- INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD =
REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL links the invasive vegetation subplot NRCS species code to the plant dictionary reference species code.

Phase 2 Vegetation subplot species table. This table provides percent cover data of vegetation species identified on the subplot.
- P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN l= PLOT.CN links the
vegetation subplot species record(s) to the unique plot record.
- P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN =
SUBO_COND.PLT_CN and P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.CONDID = SUBP_COND.CONDID and P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.SUBP l= SUBP_COND.SUBP inks the vegetation subplot species record(s) to the unique subplot condition record.
- P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD =
REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL links the P2 vegetation subplot NRCS species code to the plant dictionary reference species code.

Phase 2 Vegetation subplot structure table. This table provides percent cover by layer by growth habit.
- P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE. PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the subplot structure record(s) to the unique plot record.
- P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE.PLT_CN =
SUBP_COND.PLT_CN and P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE.CONDID = SUBO_COND.CONDID and P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE.SUBP = SUBP_COND.SUBP links the vegetation subplot structure record(s) to the unique subplot condition record.

Plot geometry table. This table contains geometric attributes associated with the plot location, such as the hydrological unit and roadless codes.
- PLOTGEOM.CN = PLOT.CN links the unique plot
record between the two tables.

Plot regeneration table. This table contains the information for the four subplots describing the amount of animal browse pressure exerted on the regeneration of trees.
- PLOT_REGEN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the unique
plot record to the unique plot regeneration record.

Plot snapshot table. This table combines the information in the PLOT table with information in the PLOT_EVAL_GRP and POP_STRATUM tables to provide a snapshot of the plot records with their associated expansion and adjustment factors.
- PLOTSNAP.CN = PLOT.CN links the unique plot
record between the two tables.

Plot table. This table provides information relevant to the entire 1-acre field plot. This table links to most other tables, and the linkage is made using PLOT.CN = TABLE_NAME.PLT_CN (TABLE_NAME is the name of any table containing the column name PLT_CN). Below are some examples of linking PLOT to other tables.
- PLOT.CN = COND.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the condition class record(s).
- PLOT.CN = SUBPLOT.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the subplot records.
- PLOT.CN = TREE.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the tree records.
- PLOT.CN = SEEDLING.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the seedling records.

Population estimation unit table. This table contains information about estimation units. An estimation unit is a geographic area that can be drawn on a map. It has a known area, and the sampling intensity must be the same within a stratum within an estimation unit. Generally, estimation units are contiguous areas, but exceptions are made when certain ownerships, usually National Forests, are sampled at different intensities. One record in the POP_ESTN_UNIT table corresponds to a single estimation unit. POP_ESTN_UNIT.CN = POP_STRATUM.ESTN_UNIT_CN links the unique stratified geographical area (ESTN_UNIT) to the strata (STRATUMCD) that are assigned to each ESTN_UNIT.

Population evaluation attribute table. This table provides information as to which population estimates can be provided by an evaluation. If an evaluation can produce only 22 of all the population estimates in the REF_POP_ATTRIBUTE table, there will be 22 records in the POP_EVAL_ATTRIBUTE table (one per population estimate) for that evaluation.
- POP_EVAL_ATTRIBUTE.EVAL_CN = POP_EVAL.CN
links the unique evaluation identifier to the list of population estimates that can be derived for that evaluation.

Population evaluation group table. This table lists and describes the evaluation groups. One record in the POP_EVAL_GRP table can be linked to all the evaluations that were used in generating estimates for a State inventory report.
- POP_EVAL_GRP.CN = POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_GRP_CN
links the evaluation group record to the evaluation type record.

Population evaluation table. This table provides information about evaluations. An evaluation is the combination of a set of plots (the sample) and a set of Phase 1 data (obtained through remote sensing, called a stratification) that can be used to produce population estimates for a State (an evaluation may be created to produce population estimates for a region other than a State, such as the Black Hills National Forest). A record in the POP_EVAL table identifies one evaluation and provides some descriptive information about how the evaluation may be used.
- POP_EVAL.CN = POP_ESTN_UNIT.EVAL_CNlinks the
unique evaluation identifier (EVALID) in the POP_EVAL table to the unique geographical areas (ESTN_UNIT) that are stratified. Within a population evaluation (EVALID) there can be multiple population estimation units, or geographic areas across which there are a number of values being estimated (e.g., estimation of volume across counties for a given State).

Population evaluation type table. This table provides information on the type of evaluations that were used to generate a set of tables for an inventory report. In a typical State inventory report, one evaluation is used to generate an estimate of the total land area; a second evaluation is used to generate current estimates of volume, numbers of trees and biomass; and a third evaluation is used for estimating growth, removals and mortality.
- POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_CN = POP_EVAL.CN links the
evaluation type record to the evaluation record.
- POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_GRP_CN = POP_EVAL_GRP.CN
links the evaluation type record to the evaluation group record.
- POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_TYP =
REF_POP_EVAL_TYP_DESCR.EVAL_TYP links an evaluation type record to an evaluation type description reference record.

Population plot stratum assignment table. This table provides a way to assign stratum information to a plot. Stratum information is assigned to a plot by overlaying the plot's location on the Phase 1 imagery. Plots are linked to their appropriate stratum for an evaluation via the POP_PLOT_STRATUM_ASSGN table.
- POP_PLOT_STRATUM_ASSGN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN
links the stratum assigned to the plot record.

Population stratum table. This table provides information about individual strata. The area within an estimation unit is divided into strata. The area for each stratum can be calculated by determining the proportion of Phase 1 pixels/plots in each stratum and multiplying that proportion by the total area in the estimation unit. Information for a single stratum is stored in a single record of the POP_STRATUM table.
- POP_STRATUM.CN =
POP_PLOT_STRATUM_ASSGN.STRATUM_CN links the defined stratum to each plot.

Project table. This table provides a list of FIA inventory projects. Each project targets one and only one population for study. A project is assigned to an FIA work unit, which has stewardship over that project.

Reference citation table. This table identifies the published source for information on specific gravities, moisture content, and bark as a percent of wood volume that is provided in the REF_SPECIES table.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.WOOD_SPGR_GREENVOL_DRYWT_CI T.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.BARK_SPGR_GREENVOL_DRYWT_CIT .
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.MC_PCT_GREEN_WOOD_CIT.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.MC_PCT_GREEN_BARK_CIT.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.WOOD_SPGR_MC12VOL_DRYWT_CIT .
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.BARK_VOL_PCT_CIT.
Reference damage agent group table. This table identifies the codes and descriptions of the damage agent groups.

Reference damage agent table. This table identifies damage agent codes, common and scientific names, and measurement thresholds for all damages collected.
- REF_ DAMAGE_AGENT.DAG_CODE =
REF_DAMAGE_AGENT_GROUP.CODE links the damage agent code to the damage agent group code.

tables_index.table_name: Reference Difference Test Per Acre Table
tables_index.description: Reference difference test per acre table. This table contains Oracle SQL scripts for comparing ratio estimates (per acre) of an attribute between two different groups.
Reference difference test totals table. This table contains Oracle SQL scripts for comparing total estimates of an attribute between two different groups.

tables_index.table_name: Reference Forest Inventory and Analysis Database Version Table
tables_index.description: Reference forest inventory and analysis database version table. This table contains information identifying the format of the currently available FIADB.

Reference forest type group table. This table contains forest type grouping codes, and descriptive names. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in MEANING to convert the code to a name.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE_GROUP.VALUE =
REF_FOREST_TYPE.TYPGRPCD links the forest type group reference record to the forest type reference record. To display the forest type group code, the forest type reference record must be linked to the condition record by linking REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE to COND.FORTYPCD, COND.FLDTYPCD, or COND.FORTYPCDCALC.

Reference forest type table. This table contains forest type codes, descriptive names and other information. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in MEANING to convert the code to a name.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE = COND.FORTYPCD links
the forest type reference record to the condition forest code used for reporting and analysis purposes.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE = COND.FLDTYPCD links
the forest type reference record to the condition forest type code recorded by field crews.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE = COND.FORTYPCDCALC
links the forest type reference record to the condition forest type code calculated by an algorithm.

tables_index.table_name: Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Location Name Table
tables_index.description: Reference forest vegetation simulator location name table. This table contains FVS variant codes, and descriptive names.

tables_index.table_name: Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Variant Name Table
tables_index.description: Reference forest vegetation simulator variant name table. This table contains FVS location codes, and descriptive names.

Reference ground layer table. This table stores bulk density coefficients for ground layer functional groups and associated information (e.g., ground layer configuration name, percent carbon content, percent nitrogen content).

Reference habitat type description table. This table contains information for individual habitat types, such as the habitat type code, associated scientific plant species abbreviation, and common name. Users wanting to know the publication that further describes the habitat type should link codes as shown below to obtain the corresponding publication information.
- REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.HABTYPCD =
COND.HABTYPCD1 and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = COND.HABTYPCD1_DESCR_PUB_CD and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = REF_HABTYP_PUBLICATION.PUB_CD links the primary habitat type code to reference description habitat code and primary habitat type publication code to the reference description publication code and reference description publication code to the publication reference information.
- REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.HABTYPCD =
COND.HABTYPCD2 and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = COND.HABTYPCD2_DESCR_PUB_CD and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = REF_HABTYP_PUBLICATION.PUB_CD links the secondary habitat type code to reference description habitat code and secondary habitat type publication code to the reference description publication code and reference description publication code to the publication reference information.
Reference habitat type publication table. This table contains the publication information (title, author) for the publication code. See the links described above in REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.

tables_index.table_name: Reference International to Doyle Volume Factors Table
tables_index.description: Reference international to Doyle volumes factors. This table contains conversion factors (by diameter class) that are multiplied by International 1/4-inch log rule board-foot volume to produce Doyle log rule board-foot volume. The Doyle log rule conversion factors are based on tree volumes from Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, and Missouri (Brand and Walkowiak 1991).

Reference invasive species table. This table contains the invasive species list by State.
- REF_INVASIVE SPECIES.SYMBOL =
INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD links the invasive species reference to the invasive species NRCS code.
- REF_INVASIVE_SPECIES.SYMBOL =
REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL links the invasive species reference to the plant dictionary reference NRCS species code.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) Hierarchy Structure Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard (NVCS) hierarchy structure table. This table describes the structure of a given National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 1 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 1 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the first level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 2 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 2 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the second level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 3 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 3 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the third level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 4 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 4 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the fourth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 5 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 5 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the fifth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 6 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 6 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the sixth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 7 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 7 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the seventh level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.

tables_index.table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 8 Codes Table
tables_index.description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 8 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the eighth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
Reference owner group code. This table identifies the codes and descriptions of the owner groups.

Reference plant dictionary table. This table contains information about plant species as defined in the NRCS PLANTS database. The species symbol, common name, scientific name, growth habit and other identifying information are included in this table. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in one of the columns such as COMMON_NAME or SCIENTIFIC_NAME to convert the code to a name.
- REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL =
INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD links the plant dictionary reference species code to the invasive vegetation subplot NRCS species code.
- REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL =
P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD links the plant dictionary reference species code to the P2 vegetation subplot NRCS species code.

Reference population attribute table. This table identifies all of the population estimates that are currently supported, and provides information useful to the estimation procedure, such as how to calculate forest area.
- REF_POP_ATTRIBUTE.ATTRIBUTE_NBR =
POP_EVAL_ATTRIBUTE.ATTRIBUTE_NBR links the description of the unique population estimate to the records of evaluations that can be used to make those estimates.

Reference population evaluation type description table. This table contains the description for each evaluation type.
- REF_POP_EVAL_TYP_DESCR.EVAL_TYP =
POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_TYP links an evaluation type description reference record to an evaluation type record.

Reference research station table. This table identifies the region or research station that is responsible for providing the inventory data for a particular State. It also lists other information for each State, including the State code, name, and abbreviation.
Reference site index equation table. This table contains information about site index equations, including references and notes.

Reference species group table. This table contains the species group code, descriptive name, and several other attributes for each species group. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in NAME to convert the code to a descriptive name.
- REF_SPECIES_GROUP.SPGRPCD = TREE.SPGRPCD
links the species group reference table to the tree species group code.
- REF_SPECIES_GROUP.SPGRPCD =
SEEDLING.SPGRPCD links the species reference table record to the seedling species group code.
- REF_SPECIES_GROUP.SPGRPCD =
SITETREE.SPGRPCD links the species reference table record to the site tree species group code.

Reference species table. This table contains the species code, descriptive common name, scientific name, and many other attributes for each species. For example, data users who want to convert the species code to the associated common name should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in COMMON_NAME.
- REF_SPECIES.SPCD = TREE.SPCD links the species
reference table record to the tree species code.
- REF_SPECIES.SPCD = SEEDLING.SPCD links the
species reference table record to the seedling species code.
- REF_SPECIES.SPCD = SITETREE.SPCD links the
species reference table record to the site tree species code.

Reference standard normal distribution table. This table contains z-scores and p-values of the standard normal distribution. This table is referenced by SQL in REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_TOTALS.SQL and REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_PER_ACRE.SQL.

Reference state elevation table. This table contains information about minimum and maximum elevation found within a State.
- REF_STATE_ELEV.STATECD = SURVEY.STATECD
links the State elevation reference record to the survey record.

tables_index.table_name: Reference Tree Carbon Ratio Dead Table
tables_index.description: Reference tree carbon ratio dead table. This table stores mean carbon ratios by decay class and softwood/hardwood classification. These carbon ratios are used by FIA for the "National Scale Volume and Biomass" (NSVB) system to estimate aboveground carbon in standing dead trees. Refer to appendix K for information on FIA volume, biomass, and carbon estimates.

Reference tree decay proportion table. This table stores density reduction factors by decay class and softwood/hardwood classification. These values are used by FIA for the "National Scale Volume and Biomass" (NSVB) system to estimate loss of mass for a decayed standing dead trees (compared to a live tree) and applied to stem wood, stem bark, and branch biomass. Refer to appendix K for information on FIA volume, biomass, and carbon estimation.

tables_index.table_name: Reference Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Type Table
tables_index.description: Reference tree growth, removal, and mortality type table. This table summarizes information identifying the method used for growth, removals, and mortality (GRM) estimation.

tables_index.table_name: Reference Tree Standing Dead Crown Ratio Proportion Table
tables_index.description: Reference tree standing dead crown ratio proportion table. This table stores mean crown ratio values by ecoregion province and softwood/hardwood classification. These values are used by FIA for the "National Scale Volume and Biomass" (NSVB) system when accounting for volume and biomass loss due to broken tops for standing dead trees.

Reference unit table. This table contains the description for each survey unit in a State.
- REF_UNIT.STATECD = PLOT.STATECD and
REF_UNIT.VALUE = PLOT.UNITCD links the survey unit description (MEANING) to the PLOT record.

Seedling regeneration table. This table contains provides information on the seedling count by condition, species, source, and length class for the tree regeneration study.
- SEEDLING_REGEN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
unique plot record to the seedling regeneration records.
- SEEDLING_REGEN.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SEEDLING_REGEN.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the regeneration seedling records to the unique condition record.

Seedling table. This table provides a count of the number of live trees of a species found on a microplot that are less than 1 inch in diameter but at least 6 inches in length for conifer species or at least 12 inches in length for hardwood species.
- SEEDLING.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the seedling
records to the unique plot record.
- SEEDLING.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SEEDLING.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the condition record to the seedling record.

Site tree table. This table provides information for site tree(s); these trees are used to calculate site index and/or site productivity information for a condition.
- SITETREE.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the site tree
records to the unique plot record.
- SITETREE.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SITETREE.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the site tree record(s) to the unique condition class record.

Subplot condition change matrix table. This table contains information about the mix of current and previous conditions that occupy the same area on the subplot.
- SUBP_COND_CHNG_MTRX.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the subplot condition change matrix records to the unique plot record.
- SUBP_COND_CHNG_MTRX.PREV_PLT_CN =
PLOT.PREV_PLT_CN links the subplot condition change matrix records to the unique previous plot record.

Subplot condition table. This table contains information about the proportion of a subplot in a condition.
- SUBP_COND.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the subplot
condition class record to the plot table.
- SUBP_COND.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBP_COND.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the condition class records found on the four subplots to the subplot description.

Subplot regeneration table. This table provides information on the subplot survey status and the site survey limitations, if any, for the tree regeneration study.
- SUBPLOT_REGEN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
unique plot record to the subplot regeneration records.
- SUBPLOT_REGEN.PLT_CN = SUBPLOT.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT_REGEN.SUBP = SUBPLOT.SUBPlinks the subplot record to the subplot regeneration record.

Subplot soil sample layer table. This table contains information about the bulk density, percent carbon and nitrogen content, and carbon and nitrogen content per acre for each soil profile layer type associated with a soil sample location.
Subplot soil sample location table. This table contains information about soil sample status and method, depth to restriction, and total carbon and nitrogen per acre, 3 inches.

Subplot table. This table describes the features of a single subplot. There are multiple subplots per 1-acre field plot and there can be multiple conditions sampled on each subplot.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the unique plot
record to the subplot records.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT.MACRCOND = COND.CONDID links the macroplot conditions to the condition class record.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT.SUBPCOND = COND.CONDID links the subplot conditions to the condition class record.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT.MICRCOND = COND.CONDID links the microplot conditions to the condition class record.

Survey table. This table contains one record for each year an inventory is conducted in a State for annual inventory or one record for each periodic inventory.
- SURVEY.CN = PLOT.SRV_CN links the unique
inventory record for a State and year to the plot records.

tables_index.table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Begin Table
tables_index.description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality begin table. This table contains information for remeasured trees at the beginning of the remeasurement period. All trees contributing to change in annual-to-annual inventories have records in this table. The information in this table is used to compute growth, removal, and mortality estimates on remeasured trees.
- TREE_GRM_BEGIN.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links each
record in this table to the corresponding record in the TREE table.

tables_index.table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Component Table
tables_index.description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality component table. This table stores information used to compute growth, removals, and mortality estimates for remeasurement trees. Each remeasurement tree has a single record in this table.
- TREE_GRM_COMPONENT.TRE_CN = TREE.TRE_CN
links the records in this table to the corresponding tree record in the TREE table.

tables_index.table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Estimation Table
tables_index.description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality estimation table. This table contains information used to produce estimates of growth, removals and mortality.
- TREE_GRM_ESTN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the tree
GRM estimation records to the unique plot record.
- TREE_GRM_ESTN.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links the tree
GRM estimation records to the unique tree record.

tables_index.table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Midpoint Table
tables_index.description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality midpoint table. This table contains information for remeasured trees at the midpoint of the remeasurement period. All trees contributing to change in annual-to-annual inventories have records in this table. The information in this table is used to compute growth, removal, and mortality estimates on remeasurement trees.
- TREE_GRM_MIDPT.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links each
record in this table to the corresponding record in the TREE table.

tables_index.table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Threshold Table
tables_index.description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality threshold table. This table stores information about ingrowth trees at specific tree threshold sizes.
- TREE_GRM_THRESHOLD.TRE.CN = TREE.CN links
the tree GRM threshold records to the unique tree record.

Tree table. This table provides information for each tree 1 inch in diameter and larger found on a microplot, subplot, or core optional macroplot.
- TREE.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the tree records to
the unique plot record.
- TREE.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and TREE.CONDID =
COND.CONDID links the tree records to the unique condition record.

Tree woodland stems table. This table stores data for the individual stems of a woodland species tree. Individual woodland stem diameter measurements contribute to the calculation of the diameter stored on the parent TREE table record.
- TREE_WOODLAND_STEMS.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links
a woodland stems record to the corresponding unique tree record.

BEGINEND.official_index_description: Begin and end table. This table contains a counter to establish how many times to access a tree record in the TREE_GRM_ESTN table. This is used when calculating net growth accounting estimates.

BOUNDARY.official_index_description:
Boundary table. This table provides a description of the demarcation line between two conditions that occur on a single subplot.
- BOUNDARY.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the boundary
records to the unique plot record.

COND_DWM_CALC.official_table_name: Condition Down Woody Material Calculation Table
COND_DWM_CALC.official_index_description:
Condition down woody material calculation table. This table contains calculated values and condition-level estimates for down woody attributes by plot number (PLOT), condition class number (CONDID), and evaluation identifier (EVALID).
- COND_DWM_CALC.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
down woody material calculation records to the unique plot record.
- COND_DWM_CALC.CND_CN = COND.CN links the
down woody material calculation records to the unique condition record.
- COND_DWM_CALC.STRATUM_CN =
POP_STRATUM.CN links the down woody material calculation records to the unique population stratum record.
COND_DWM_CALC.guide_toc_title: 5.8 Condition Down Woody Material Calculation Table
COND_DWM_CALC.guide_section_title: Condition Down Woody Material Calculation Table

COND.official_index_description:
Condition table. This table provides information on the discrete combination of landscape attributes that define the condition (a condition will have the same land class, reserved status, owner group, forest type, stand-size class, regeneration status, and stand density).
- COND.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the condition class
record(s) to the plot table.
- COND.PLT_CN = SITETREE.PLT_CN and
COND.CONDID = SITETREE.CONDID links the condition class record to the site tree data.
- COND.PLT_CN = TREE.PLT_CN and COND.CONDID
= TREE.CONDID links the condition class record to the tree data.

COUNTY.official_index_description:
County table. This table contains survey unit codes and is also a reference table for the county codes and names.
- COUNTY.CN = PLOT.CTY_CN links the unique county
record to the plot record.

DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.official_table_name: Down Woody Material Coarse Woody Debris Table
DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.official_index_description:
Down woody material coarse woody debris table. This table provides information for each piece of coarse woody debris measured along the transects.
- DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN =
PLOT.CN links the down woody material coarse woody debris records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN =
COND.PLT_CN and DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the coarse woody debris records to the unique condition record.
DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.guide_toc_title: 5.2 Down Woody Material Coarse Woody Debris Table
DWM_COARSE_WOODY_DEBRIS.guide_section_title: Down Woody Material Coarse Woody Debris Table

DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.official_table_name: Down Woody Material Duff, Litter, Fuel Table
DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.official_index_description:
Down woody material duff, litter, fuel table. This table provides information on the duff, litter, fuelbed depths measured at a point on the transects.
- DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the duff, litter, fuelbed records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN
and DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the duff, litter, fuel records to the unique condition record.
DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.guide_toc_title: 5.3 Down Woody Material Duff, Litter, Fuel Table
DWM_DUFF_LITTER_FUEL.guide_section_title: Down Woody Material Duff, Litter, Fuel Table

DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.official_table_name: Down Woody Material Fine Woody Debris Table
DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.official_index_description:
Down woody material fine woody debris table. This table provides information on the fine woody debris measured along a segment of the transects.
- DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN
links the fine woody debris records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.PLT_CN =
COND.PLT_CN and DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the fine woody debris records to the unique condition record.
DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.guide_toc_title: 5.4 Down Woody Material Fine Woody Debris Table
DWM_FINE_WOODY_DEBRIS.guide_section_title: Down Woody Material Fine Woody Debris Table

DWM_MICROPLOT_FUEL.official_table_name: Down Woody Material Microplot Fuel Table
DWM_MICROPLOT_FUEL.official_index_description:
Down woody material microplot fuel table. This table provides information on the fuel loads (shrubs and herbs) measured on the microplot.
- DWM_MICROPLOT_FUEL.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the microplot fuel records to the unique plot record.
DWM_MICROPLOT_FUEL.guide_toc_title: 5.5 Down Woody Material Microplot Fuel Table
DWM_MICROPLOT_FUEL.guide_section_title: Down Woody Material Microplot Fuel Table

DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.official_table_name: Down Woody Material Residual Pile Table
DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.official_index_description:
Down woody material residual pile table. This table provides information on the wood piles measured on the subplot.
- DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
wood piles records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CNand
DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the wood piles records to the unique condition record.
DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.guide_toc_title: 5.6 Down Woody Material Residual Pile Table
DWM_RESIDUAL_PILE.guide_section_title: Down Woody Material Residual Pile Table

DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.official_table_name: Down Woody Material Transect Segment Table
DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.official_index_description:
Down woody material transect segment table. This table describes the down woody material transect segment lengths by condition class.
- DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN
links the down woody material transect length records to the unique plot record.
- DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.PLT_CN =
COND.PLT_CN and DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the down woody material transect segment records to the unique condition record.
DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.guide_toc_title: 5.7 Down Woody Material Transect Segment Table
DWM_TRANSECT_SEGMENT.guide_section_title: Down Woody Material Transect Segment Table

DWM_VISIT.official_index_description:
Down woody material visit table. This table provides general information on down woody material indicator visit, such as the date of the DWM survey.
- DWM_VISIT.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the down
woody material indicator visit record to the unique plot record.

GRND_CVR.official_index_description:
Ground cover table. This table provides ground cover measurement data for National Forest System (NFS) ownership protocols.
- GRND_CVR.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the ground
cover record to the unique plot record.

GRND_LYR_FNCTL_GRP.official_index_description: Ground layer functional groups table. This table is used to record the data for thirteen ground layer functional groups that may be found on the sampled microquadrats. These data are used to determine nonvascular forest floor composition and carbon content on forest and nonforest conditions.

GRND_LYR_MICROQUAD.official_index_description: Ground layer microquadrat table. This table records ground layer data for the microquadrats.

INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.official_index_description:
Invasive subplot species table. This table provides percent cover data of invasive species identified on the subplot.
- INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the invasive subplot species record(s) to the unique plot record.
- INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN =
SUBP_COND.PLT_CN and INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.CONDID = SUBP_COND.CONDID and INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.SUBP = SUBP_COND.SUBP links the invasive subplot species record(s) to the unique subplot condition record.
- INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD =
REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL links the invasive vegetation subplot NRCS species code to the plant dictionary reference species code.

P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.official_index_description:
Phase 2 Vegetation subplot species table. This table provides percent cover data of vegetation species identified on the subplot.
- P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN l= PLOT.CN links the
vegetation subplot species record(s) to the unique plot record.
- P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.PLT_CN =
SUBO_COND.PLT_CN and P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.CONDID = SUBP_COND.CONDID and P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.SUBP l= SUBP_COND.SUBP inks the vegetation subplot species record(s) to the unique subplot condition record.
- P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD =
REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL links the P2 vegetation subplot NRCS species code to the plant dictionary reference species code.

P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE.official_index_description:
Phase 2 Vegetation subplot structure table. This table provides percent cover by layer by growth habit.
- P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE. PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the subplot structure record(s) to the unique plot record.
- P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE.PLT_CN =
SUBP_COND.PLT_CN and P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE.CONDID = SUBO_COND.CONDID and P2VEG_SUBP_STRUCTURE.SUBP = SUBP_COND.SUBP links the vegetation subplot structure record(s) to the unique subplot condition record.

PLOTGEOM.official_index_description:
Plot geometry table. This table contains geometric attributes associated with the plot location, such as the hydrological unit and roadless codes.
- PLOTGEOM.CN = PLOT.CN links the unique plot
record between the two tables.

PLOT_REGEN.official_index_description:
Plot regeneration table. This table contains the information for the four subplots describing the amount of animal browse pressure exerted on the regeneration of trees.
- PLOT_REGEN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the unique
plot record to the unique plot regeneration record.

PLOTSNAP.official_index_description:
Plot snapshot table. This table combines the information in the PLOT table with information in the PLOT_EVAL_GRP and POP_STRATUM tables to provide a snapshot of the plot records with their associated expansion and adjustment factors.
- PLOTSNAP.CN = PLOT.CN links the unique plot
record between the two tables.

PLOT.official_index_description:
Plot table. This table provides information relevant to the entire 1-acre field plot. This table links to most other tables, and the linkage is made using PLOT.CN = TABLE_NAME.PLT_CN (TABLE_NAME is the name of any table containing the column name PLT_CN). Below are some examples of linking PLOT to other tables.
- PLOT.CN = COND.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the condition class record(s).
- PLOT.CN = SUBPLOT.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the subplot records.
- PLOT.CN = TREE.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the tree records.
- PLOT.CN = SEEDLING.PLT_CN links the unique plot
record to the seedling records.

POP_ESTN_UNIT.official_index_description: Population estimation unit table. This table contains information about estimation units. An estimation unit is a geographic area that can be drawn on a map. It has a known area, and the sampling intensity must be the same within a stratum within an estimation unit. Generally, estimation units are contiguous areas, but exceptions are made when certain ownerships, usually National Forests, are sampled at different intensities. One record in the POP_ESTN_UNIT table corresponds to a single estimation unit. POP_ESTN_UNIT.CN = POP_STRATUM.ESTN_UNIT_CN links the unique stratified geographical area (ESTN_UNIT) to the strata (STRATUMCD) that are assigned to each ESTN_UNIT.

POP_EVAL_ATTRIBUTE.official_index_description:
Population evaluation attribute table. This table provides information as to which population estimates can be provided by an evaluation. If an evaluation can produce only 22 of all the population estimates in the REF_POP_ATTRIBUTE table, there will be 22 records in the POP_EVAL_ATTRIBUTE table (one per population estimate) for that evaluation.
- POP_EVAL_ATTRIBUTE.EVAL_CN = POP_EVAL.CN
links the unique evaluation identifier to the list of population estimates that can be derived for that evaluation.

POP_EVAL_GRP.official_index_description:
Population evaluation group table. This table lists and describes the evaluation groups. One record in the POP_EVAL_GRP table can be linked to all the evaluations that were used in generating estimates for a State inventory report.
- POP_EVAL_GRP.CN = POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_GRP_CN
links the evaluation group record to the evaluation type record.

POP_EVAL.official_index_description:
Population evaluation table. This table provides information about evaluations. An evaluation is the combination of a set of plots (the sample) and a set of Phase 1 data (obtained through remote sensing, called a stratification) that can be used to produce population estimates for a State (an evaluation may be created to produce population estimates for a region other than a State, such as the Black Hills National Forest). A record in the POP_EVAL table identifies one evaluation and provides some descriptive information about how the evaluation may be used.
- POP_EVAL.CN = POP_ESTN_UNIT.EVAL_CNlinks the
unique evaluation identifier (EVALID) in the POP_EVAL table to the unique geographical areas (ESTN_UNIT) that are stratified. Within a population evaluation (EVALID) there can be multiple population estimation units, or geographic areas across which there are a number of values being estimated (e.g., estimation of volume across counties for a given State).

POP_EVAL_TYP.official_index_description:
Population evaluation type table. This table provides information on the type of evaluations that were used to generate a set of tables for an inventory report. In a typical State inventory report, one evaluation is used to generate an estimate of the total land area; a second evaluation is used to generate current estimates of volume, numbers of trees and biomass; and a third evaluation is used for estimating growth, removals and mortality.
- POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_CN = POP_EVAL.CN links the
evaluation type record to the evaluation record.
- POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_GRP_CN = POP_EVAL_GRP.CN
links the evaluation type record to the evaluation group record.
- POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_TYP =
REF_POP_EVAL_TYP_DESCR.EVAL_TYP links an evaluation type record to an evaluation type description reference record.

POP_PLOT_STRATUM_ASSGN.official_index_description:
Population plot stratum assignment table. This table provides a way to assign stratum information to a plot. Stratum information is assigned to a plot by overlaying the plot's location on the Phase 1 imagery. Plots are linked to their appropriate stratum for an evaluation via the POP_PLOT_STRATUM_ASSGN table.
- POP_PLOT_STRATUM_ASSGN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN
links the stratum assigned to the plot record.

POP_STRATUM.official_index_description:
Population stratum table. This table provides information about individual strata. The area within an estimation unit is divided into strata. The area for each stratum can be calculated by determining the proportion of Phase 1 pixels/plots in each stratum and multiplying that proportion by the total area in the estimation unit. Information for a single stratum is stored in a single record of the POP_STRATUM table.
- POP_STRATUM.CN =
POP_PLOT_STRATUM_ASSGN.STRATUM_CN links the defined stratum to each plot.

PROJECT.official_index_description: Project table. This table provides a list of FIA inventory projects. Each project targets one and only one population for study. A project is assigned to an FIA work unit, which has stewardship over that project.

REF_CITATION.official_index_description:
Reference citation table. This table identifies the published source for information on specific gravities, moisture content, and bark as a percent of wood volume that is provided in the REF_SPECIES table.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.WOOD_SPGR_GREENVOL_DRYWT_CI T.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.BARK_SPGR_GREENVOL_DRYWT_CIT .
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.MC_PCT_GREEN_WOOD_CIT.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.MC_PCT_GREEN_BARK_CIT.
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.WOOD_SPGR_MC12VOL_DRYWT_CIT .
- REF_CITATION.CITATION_NBR =
REF_SPECIES.BARK_VOL_PCT_CIT.

REF_DAMAGE_AGENT_GROUP.official_index_description: Reference damage agent group table. This table identifies the codes and descriptions of the damage agent groups.

REF_DAMAGE_AGENT.official_index_description:
Reference damage agent table. This table identifies damage agent codes, common and scientific names, and measurement thresholds for all damages collected.
- REF_ DAMAGE_AGENT.DAG_CODE =
REF_DAMAGE_AGENT_GROUP.CODE links the damage agent code to the damage agent group code.

REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_PER_ACRE.official_table_name: Reference Difference Test Per Acre Table
REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_PER_ACRE.official_index_description: Reference difference test per acre table. This table contains Oracle SQL scripts for comparing ratio estimates (per acre) of an attribute between two different groups.
REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_PER_ACRE.guide_toc_title: 11.30 Reference Difference Test Per Acre Table
REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_PER_ACRE.guide_section_title: Reference Difference Test Per Acre Table

REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_TOTALS.official_index_description: Reference difference test totals table. This table contains Oracle SQL scripts for comparing total estimates of an attribute between two different groups.

REF_FIADB_VERSION.official_table_name: Reference Forest Inventory and Analysis Database Version Table
REF_FIADB_VERSION.official_index_description: Reference forest inventory and analysis database version table. This table contains information identifying the format of the currently available FIADB.
REF_FIADB_VERSION.guide_toc_title: 11.12 Reference Forest Inventory and Analysis Database Version Table
REF_FIADB_VERSION.guide_section_title: Reference Forest Inventory and Analysis Database Version Table

REF_FOREST_TYPE_GROUP.official_index_description:
Reference forest type group table. This table contains forest type grouping codes, and descriptive names. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in MEANING to convert the code to a name.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE_GROUP.VALUE =
REF_FOREST_TYPE.TYPGRPCD links the forest type group reference record to the forest type reference record. To display the forest type group code, the forest type reference record must be linked to the condition record by linking REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE to COND.FORTYPCD, COND.FLDTYPCD, or COND.FORTYPCDCALC.

REF_FOREST_TYPE.official_index_description:
Reference forest type table. This table contains forest type codes, descriptive names and other information. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in MEANING to convert the code to a name.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE = COND.FORTYPCD links
the forest type reference record to the condition forest code used for reporting and analysis purposes.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE = COND.FLDTYPCD links
the forest type reference record to the condition forest type code recorded by field crews.
- REF_FOREST_TYPE.VALUE = COND.FORTYPCDCALC
links the forest type reference record to the condition forest type code calculated by an algorithm.

REF_FVS_LOC_NAME.official_table_name: Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Location Name Table
REF_FVS_LOC_NAME.official_index_description: Reference forest vegetation simulator location name table. This table contains FVS variant codes, and descriptive names.
REF_FVS_LOC_NAME.guide_toc_title: 11.28 Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Location Name Table
REF_FVS_LOC_NAME.guide_section_title: Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Location Name Table

REF_FVS_VAR_NAME.official_table_name: Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Variant Name Table
REF_FVS_VAR_NAME.official_index_description: Reference forest vegetation simulator variant name table. This table contains FVS location codes, and descriptive names.
REF_FVS_VAR_NAME.guide_toc_title: 11.27 Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Variant Name Table
REF_FVS_VAR_NAME.guide_section_title: Reference Forest Vegetation Simulator Variant Name Table

REF_GRND_LYR.official_index_description: Reference ground layer table. This table stores bulk density coefficients for ground layer functional groups and associated information (e.g., ground layer configuration name, percent carbon content, percent nitrogen content).

REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.official_index_description:
Reference habitat type description table. This table contains information for individual habitat types, such as the habitat type code, associated scientific plant species abbreviation, and common name. Users wanting to know the publication that further describes the habitat type should link codes as shown below to obtain the corresponding publication information.
- REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.HABTYPCD =
COND.HABTYPCD1 and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = COND.HABTYPCD1_DESCR_PUB_CD and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = REF_HABTYP_PUBLICATION.PUB_CD links the primary habitat type code to reference description habitat code and primary habitat type publication code to the reference description publication code and reference description publication code to the publication reference information.
- REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.HABTYPCD =
COND.HABTYPCD2 and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = COND.HABTYPCD2_DESCR_PUB_CD and REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.PUB_CD = REF_HABTYP_PUBLICATION.PUB_CD links the secondary habitat type code to reference description habitat code and secondary habitat type publication code to the reference description publication code and reference description publication code to the publication reference information.

REF_HABTYP_PUBLICATION.official_index_description: Reference habitat type publication table. This table contains the publication information (title, author) for the publication code. See the links described above in REF_HABTYP_DESCRIPTION.

REF_INTL_TO_DOYLE_FACTOR.official_table_name: Reference International to Doyle Volume Factors Table
REF_INTL_TO_DOYLE_FACTOR.official_index_description: Reference international to Doyle volumes factors. This table contains conversion factors (by diameter class) that are multiplied by International 1/4-inch log rule board-foot volume to produce Doyle log rule board-foot volume. The Doyle log rule conversion factors are based on tree volumes from Illinois, Indiana, Iowa, and Missouri (Brand and Walkowiak 1991).
REF_INTL_TO_DOYLE_FACTOR.guide_toc_title: 11.34 Reference International to Doyle Volume Factors Table
REF_INTL_TO_DOYLE_FACTOR.guide_section_title: Reference International to Doyle Volume Factors Table

REF_INVASIVE_SPECIES.official_index_description:
Reference invasive species table. This table contains the invasive species list by State.
- REF_INVASIVE SPECIES.SYMBOL =
INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD links the invasive species reference to the invasive species NRCS code.
- REF_INVASIVE_SPECIES.SYMBOL =
REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL links the invasive species reference to the plant dictionary reference NRCS species code.

REF_NVCS_HIERARCHY_STRCT.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) Hierarchy Structure Table
REF_NVCS_HIERARCHY_STRCT.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard (NVCS) hierarchy structure table. This table describes the structure of a given National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_HIERARCHY_STRCT.guide_toc_title: 11.16 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) Hierarchy Structure Table
REF_NVCS_HIERARCHY_STRCT.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) Hierarchy Structure Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_1_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 1 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_1_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 1 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the first level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_1_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.17 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 1 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_1_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 1 Codes Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_2_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 2 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_2_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 2 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the second level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_2_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.18 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 2 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_2_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 2 Codes Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_3_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 3 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_3_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 3 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the third level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_3_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.19 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 3 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_3_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 3 Codes Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_4_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 4 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_4_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 4 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the fourth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_4_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.20 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 4 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_4_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 4 Codes Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_5_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 5 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_5_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 5 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the fifth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_5_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.21 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 5 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_5_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 5 Codes Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_6_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 6 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_6_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 6 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the sixth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_6_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.22 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 6 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_6_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 6 Codes Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_7_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 7 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_7_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 7 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the seventh level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_7_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.23 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 7 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_7_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 7 Codes Table

REF_NVCS_LEVEL_8_CODES.official_table_name: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 8 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_8_CODES.official_index_description: Reference national vegetation classification standard level 8 codes table. This table contains definitions of the codes for the eighth level of the National Vegetation Classification Standard (NVCS) hierarchy.
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_8_CODES.guide_toc_title: 11.24 Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 8 Codes Table
REF_NVCS_LEVEL_8_CODES.guide_section_title: Reference National Vegetation Classification Standard Level 8 Codes Table

REF_OWNGRPCD.official_index_description: Reference owner group code. This table identifies the codes and descriptions of the owner groups.

REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.official_index_description:
Reference plant dictionary table. This table contains information about plant species as defined in the NRCS PLANTS database. The species symbol, common name, scientific name, growth habit and other identifying information are included in this table. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in one of the columns such as COMMON_NAME or SCIENTIFIC_NAME to convert the code to a name.
- REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL =
INVASIVE_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD links the plant dictionary reference species code to the invasive vegetation subplot NRCS species code.
- REF_PLANT_DICTIONARY.SYMBOL =
P2VEG_SUBPLOT_SPP.VEG_SPCD links the plant dictionary reference species code to the P2 vegetation subplot NRCS species code.

REF_POP_ATTRIBUTE.official_index_description:
Reference population attribute table. This table identifies all of the population estimates that are currently supported, and provides information useful to the estimation procedure, such as how to calculate forest area.
- REF_POP_ATTRIBUTE.ATTRIBUTE_NBR =
POP_EVAL_ATTRIBUTE.ATTRIBUTE_NBR links the description of the unique population estimate to the records of evaluations that can be used to make those estimates.

REF_POP_EVAL_TYP_DESCR.official_index_description:
Reference population evaluation type description table. This table contains the description for each evaluation type.
- REF_POP_EVAL_TYP_DESCR.EVAL_TYP =
POP_EVAL_TYP.EVAL_TYP links an evaluation type description reference record to an evaluation type record.
REF_POP_EVAL_TYP_DESCR.guide_toc_title: 11.2 Reference Population Evaluation Type Description Table
REF_POP_EVAL_TYP_DESCR.guide_section_title: Reference Population Evaluation Type Description Table

REF_RESEARCH_STATION.official_index_description: Reference research station table. This table identifies the region or research station that is responsible for providing the inventory data for a particular State. It also lists other information for each State, including the State code, name, and abbreviation.

REF_SIEQN.official_index_description: Reference site index equation table. This table contains information about site index equations, including references and notes.

REF_SPECIES_GROUP.official_index_description:
Reference species group table. This table contains the species group code, descriptive name, and several other attributes for each species group. Data users should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in NAME to convert the code to a descriptive name.
- REF_SPECIES_GROUP.SPGRPCD = TREE.SPGRPCD
links the species group reference table to the tree species group code.
- REF_SPECIES_GROUP.SPGRPCD =
SEEDLING.SPGRPCD links the species reference table record to the seedling species group code.
- REF_SPECIES_GROUP.SPGRPCD =
SITETREE.SPGRPCD links the species reference table record to the site tree species group code.

REF_SPECIES.official_index_description:
Reference species table. This table contains the species code, descriptive common name, scientific name, and many other attributes for each species. For example, data users who want to convert the species code to the associated common name should link codes as shown below and then obtain the information stored in COMMON_NAME.
- REF_SPECIES.SPCD = TREE.SPCD links the species
reference table record to the tree species code.
- REF_SPECIES.SPCD = SEEDLING.SPCD links the
species reference table record to the seedling species code.
- REF_SPECIES.SPCD = SITETREE.SPCD links the
species reference table record to the site tree species code.

REF_STD_NORM_DIST.official_index_description: Reference standard normal distribution table. This table contains z-scores and p-values of the standard normal distribution. This table is referenced by SQL in REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_TOTALS.SQL and REF_DIFFERENCE_TEST_PER_ACRE.SQL.

REF_STATE_ELEV.official_index_description:
Reference state elevation table. This table contains information about minimum and maximum elevation found within a State.
- REF_STATE_ELEV.STATECD = SURVEY.STATECD
links the State elevation reference record to the survey record.

REF_TREE_CARBON_RATIO_DEAD.official_table_name: Reference Tree Carbon Ratio Dead Table
REF_TREE_CARBON_RATIO_DEAD.official_index_description: Reference tree carbon ratio dead table. This table stores mean carbon ratios by decay class and softwood/hardwood classification. These carbon ratios are used by FIA for the "National Scale Volume and Biomass" (NSVB) system to estimate aboveground carbon in standing dead trees. Refer to appendix K for information on FIA volume, biomass, and carbon estimates.
REF_TREE_CARBON_RATIO_DEAD.guide_toc_title: 11.35 Reference Tree Carbon Ratio Dead Table
REF_TREE_CARBON_RATIO_DEAD.guide_section_title: Reference Tree Carbon Ratio Dead Table

REF_TREE_DECAY_PROP.official_index_description: Reference tree decay proportion table. This table stores density reduction factors by decay class and softwood/hardwood classification. These values are used by FIA for the "National Scale Volume and Biomass" (NSVB) system to estimate loss of mass for a decayed standing dead trees (compared to a live tree) and applied to stem wood, stem bark, and branch biomass. Refer to appendix K for information on FIA volume, biomass, and carbon estimation.

REF_GRM_TYPE.official_table_name: Reference Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Type Table
REF_GRM_TYPE.official_index_description: Reference tree growth, removal, and mortality type table. This table summarizes information identifying the method used for growth, removals, and mortality (GRM) estimation.
REF_GRM_TYPE.guide_toc_title: 11.33 Reference Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Type Table
REF_GRM_TYPE.guide_section_title: Reference Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Type Table

REF_TREE_STND_DEAD_CR_PROP.official_table_name: Reference Tree Standing Dead Crown Ratio Proportion Table
REF_TREE_STND_DEAD_CR_PROP.official_index_description: Reference tree standing dead crown ratio proportion table. This table stores mean crown ratio values by ecoregion province and softwood/hardwood classification. These values are used by FIA for the "National Scale Volume and Biomass" (NSVB) system when accounting for volume and biomass loss due to broken tops for standing dead trees.
REF_TREE_STND_DEAD_CR_PROP.guide_toc_title: 11.37 Reference Tree Standing Dead Crown Ratio Proportion Table
REF_TREE_STND_DEAD_CR_PROP.guide_section_title: Reference Tree Standing Dead Crown Ratio Proportion Table

REF_UNIT.official_index_description:
Reference unit table. This table contains the description for each survey unit in a State.
- REF_UNIT.STATECD = PLOT.STATECD and
REF_UNIT.VALUE = PLOT.UNITCD links the survey unit description (MEANING) to the PLOT record.

SEEDLING_REGEN.official_index_description:
Seedling regeneration table. This table contains provides information on the seedling count by condition, species, source, and length class for the tree regeneration study.
- SEEDLING_REGEN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
unique plot record to the seedling regeneration records.
- SEEDLING_REGEN.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SEEDLING_REGEN.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the regeneration seedling records to the unique condition record.

SEEDLING.official_index_description:
Seedling table. This table provides a count of the number of live trees of a species found on a microplot that are less than 1 inch in diameter but at least 6 inches in length for conifer species or at least 12 inches in length for hardwood species.
- SEEDLING.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the seedling
records to the unique plot record.
- SEEDLING.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SEEDLING.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the condition record to the seedling record.

SITETREE.official_index_description:
Site tree table. This table provides information for site tree(s); these trees are used to calculate site index and/or site productivity information for a condition.
- SITETREE.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the site tree
records to the unique plot record.
- SITETREE.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SITETREE.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the site tree record(s) to the unique condition class record.

SUBP_COND_CHNG_MTRX.official_index_description:
Subplot condition change matrix table. This table contains information about the mix of current and previous conditions that occupy the same area on the subplot.
- SUBP_COND_CHNG_MTRX.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links
the subplot condition change matrix records to the unique plot record.
- SUBP_COND_CHNG_MTRX.PREV_PLT_CN =
PLOT.PREV_PLT_CN links the subplot condition change matrix records to the unique previous plot record.

SUBP_COND.official_index_description:
Subplot condition table. This table contains information about the proportion of a subplot in a condition.
- SUBP_COND.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the subplot
condition class record to the plot table.
- SUBP_COND.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBP_COND.CONDID = COND.CONDID links the condition class records found on the four subplots to the subplot description.

SUBPLOT_REGEN.official_index_description:
Subplot regeneration table. This table provides information on the subplot survey status and the site survey limitations, if any, for the tree regeneration study.
- SUBPLOT_REGEN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the
unique plot record to the subplot regeneration records.
- SUBPLOT_REGEN.PLT_CN = SUBPLOT.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT_REGEN.SUBP = SUBPLOT.SUBPlinks the subplot record to the subplot regeneration record.

SUBP_SOIL_SAMPLE_LAYER.official_index_description: Subplot soil sample layer table. This table contains information about the bulk density, percent carbon and nitrogen content, and carbon and nitrogen content per acre for each soil profile layer type associated with a soil sample location.

SUBP_SOIL_SAMPLE_LOC.official_index_description: Subplot soil sample location table. This table contains information about soil sample status and method, depth to restriction, and total carbon and nitrogen per acre, 3 inches.

SUBPLOT.official_index_description:
Subplot table. This table describes the features of a single subplot. There are multiple subplots per 1-acre field plot and there can be multiple conditions sampled on each subplot.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the unique plot
record to the subplot records.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT.MACRCOND = COND.CONDID links the macroplot conditions to the condition class record.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT.SUBPCOND = COND.CONDID links the subplot conditions to the condition class record.
- SUBPLOT.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and
SUBPLOT.MICRCOND = COND.CONDID links the microplot conditions to the condition class record.

SURVEY.official_index_description:
Survey table. This table contains one record for each year an inventory is conducted in a State for annual inventory or one record for each periodic inventory.
- SURVEY.CN = PLOT.SRV_CN links the unique
inventory record for a State and year to the plot records.

TREE_GRM_BEGIN.official_table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Begin Table
TREE_GRM_BEGIN.official_index_description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality begin table. This table contains information for remeasured trees at the beginning of the remeasurement period. All trees contributing to change in annual-to-annual inventories have records in this table. The information in this table is used to compute growth, removal, and mortality estimates on remeasured trees.
- TREE_GRM_BEGIN.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links each
record in this table to the corresponding record in the TREE table.
TREE_GRM_BEGIN.guide_toc_title: 3.6 Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Begin Table
TREE_GRM_BEGIN.guide_section_title: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Begin Table

TREE_GRM_COMPONENT.official_table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Component Table
TREE_GRM_COMPONENT.official_index_description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality component table. This table stores information used to compute growth, removals, and mortality estimates for remeasurement trees. Each remeasurement tree has a single record in this table.
- TREE_GRM_COMPONENT.TRE_CN = TREE.TRE_CN
links the records in this table to the corresponding tree record in the TREE table.
TREE_GRM_COMPONENT.guide_toc_title: 3.3 Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Component Table
TREE_GRM_COMPONENT.guide_section_title: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Component Table

TREE_GRM_ESTN.official_table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Estimation Table
TREE_GRM_ESTN.official_index_description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality estimation table. This table contains information used to produce estimates of growth, removals and mortality.
- TREE_GRM_ESTN.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the tree
GRM estimation records to the unique plot record.
- TREE_GRM_ESTN.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links the tree
GRM estimation records to the unique tree record.
TREE_GRM_ESTN.guide_toc_title: 3.7 Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Estimation Table
TREE_GRM_ESTN.guide_section_title: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Estimation Table

TREE_GRM_MIDPT.official_table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Midpoint Table
TREE_GRM_MIDPT.official_index_description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality midpoint table. This table contains information for remeasured trees at the midpoint of the remeasurement period. All trees contributing to change in annual-to-annual inventories have records in this table. The information in this table is used to compute growth, removal, and mortality estimates on remeasurement trees.
- TREE_GRM_MIDPT.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links each
record in this table to the corresponding record in the TREE table.
TREE_GRM_MIDPT.guide_toc_title: 3.5 Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Midpoint Table
TREE_GRM_MIDPT.guide_section_title: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Midpoint Table

TREE_GRM_THRESHOLD.official_table_name: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Threshold Table
TREE_GRM_THRESHOLD.official_index_description:
Tree growth, removal, and mortality threshold table. This table stores information about ingrowth trees at specific tree threshold sizes.
- TREE_GRM_THRESHOLD.TRE.CN = TREE.CN links
the tree GRM threshold records to the unique tree record.
TREE_GRM_THRESHOLD.guide_toc_title: 3.4 Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Threshold Table
TREE_GRM_THRESHOLD.guide_section_title: Tree Growth, Removal, and Mortality Threshold Table

TREE.official_index_description:
Tree table. This table provides information for each tree 1 inch in diameter and larger found on a microplot, subplot, or core optional macroplot.
- TREE.PLT_CN = PLOT.CN links the tree records to
the unique plot record.
- TREE.PLT_CN = COND.PLT_CN and TREE.CONDID =
COND.CONDID links the tree records to the unique condition record.

TREE_WOODLAND_STEMS.official_index_description:
Tree woodland stems table. This table stores data for the individual stems of a woodland species tree. Individual woodland stem diameter measurements contribute to the calculation of the diameter stored on the parent TREE table record.
- TREE_WOODLAND_STEMS.TRE_CN = TREE.CN links
a woodland stems record to the corresponding unique tree record.
